=== Dropped tables

[cols="2,4"]
|===
| MySQL table | Reason

| `aplctn_mngmt_raw_cleaned` | Long-deprecated flat import from a SharePoint export; 100+ varchar columns; no migration value.
| `aplctn_vrsn` | App/schema version ledger (`id, script`); empty framework metadata.
| `deliverables_load` | Dirty flat import (`Notes (2)`, `MyUnknownColumn`, `PMDA Comments`); twin of `aplctn_mngmt_raw_cleaned`.
| `email_blnd_cpy_rcpnt` | Notification machinery; same.
| `email_cpy_rcpnt` | Notification machinery; same.
| `email_dstrbtn_grp_mmbr` | Distribution-group membership; notification machinery, no DEMOS counterpart.
| `email_dstrbtn_grp_rfrnc` | Distribution-group lookup; same family as `email_subj_rfrnc`/`email_tmplt_rfrnc`.
| `email_hstry` | Notification machinery; no DEMOS counterpart. New app handles notifications differently.
| `email_prmry_rcpnt` | Notification machinery; same.
| `email_subj_rfrnc` | Notification machinery; same.
| `email_tmplt_rfrnc` | Notification machinery; same.
| `err_log` | Application error log; new app has its own logging.
| `intrfc_etl_run_cntl` | ETL batch run-control/audit ledger; the new app owns its ingestion.
| `mdcd_dlvrbl_prd_strt_dt_temp` | Explicit `_temp` scratch table; `dlvrbl_prd_strt_dt` already lives on base `mdcd_dlvrbl`.
| `mdcd_help_and_sprt_matl_dwnld_hstry` | Download audit; not modeled in DEMOS.
| `mdcd_ltss_pgm_dtl_bkup` | Operational backup of LTSS program detail; superseded by base table.
| `mdcd_ltss_pgm_dtl_hstry_bkup` | Operational backup of LTSS history; superseded by base history.
| `mdcd_pendg_fmly_plng_pgm_dtl_bkup` | Operational backup; superseded.
| `mdcd_pendg_fmly_plng_pgm_dtl_hstry_bkup` | Operational backup; superseded.
| `mdcd_pendg_ltss_pgm_dtl_bkup` | Operational backup; superseded.
| `mdcd_pendg_ltss_pgm_dtl_hstry_bkup` | Operational backup; superseded.
| `mdcd_prm_astnc_pgm_dtl_bkup` | Operational backup; superseded.
| `mdcd_wbnr_dwnld_hstry` | Webinar download audit; same pattern as the other `*_dwnld_hstry` tables.
| `migrations` | MySQL's own schema-migration ledger (`id, migration, batch`); framework metadata.
| `mntrg_rpt_tmplt_dwnld_hstry` | Download audit; not modeled in DEMOS.
| `sys_ntfctn_bar` | System notification-bar text; notification machinery, no DEMOS counterpart.
| `user_login_hstry` | Login audit; new app has its own auth audit.
| `v_app_mgmt_demo_types` | MySQL view; same.
| `v_app_mgmt_demo_types_incl_dltd` | MySQL view; same.
| `v_demo_mgmt_demo_types` | MySQL view; reconstructed in the DEMOS (`demos_app`) schema if the new app needs it.
| `v_demo_mgmt_mrt_demo_types` | MySQL view; same.
| `v_demo_status_dtl` | MySQL view; same.
|===
